state.next-action: 2026-04-18 evening sweep: (4) 45-21 README copy pass DONE — README.md "## Evals" section rewritten as "## Generations" with project/species/generation definitions and articles-as-whitepapers framing; docs link relabeled "Species & Generations Guide"; docs/eval-guide.md fully rewritten to canonical CLI vocabulary (gad projects init, gad species *, gad spawn, gad generation *) — kept the URL via historical-filename callout; AGENTS.md/CONTRIBUTING.md left as-is (only internal-taxonomy `eval` references remain). Foreign-language READMEs out of scope (translation work). (5) 44-28 spine FIRST CUT — 44-32 done (`--site`/`--planning`/`--node`/`--from-release`/`--target` flags + help block + smoke-tested), 44-33 done (Next standalone output, `site/scripts/launcher.cjs` Node-shim, `site/scripts/pack-site-release.cjs` cross-platform zipper, `pnpm pack:site` script, install.js wiring), 44-34 in-progress (stub scaffolds .planning/.node + .planning/.cmd; real Node download deferred until 44-31 release pipeline ships node zip). 44-28 umbrella stays planned per the open follow-ups. New deliverables: `references/installer-feature-flags.md` (full reference), `.planning/notes/2026-04-18-44-28-spine-first-cut.md` (status snapshot). Consumer first-run path now works: `gad.exe --planning --site --from-release v1.35.0` → `node .planning/site/launcher.cjs` → http://127.0.0.1:5560/. Tests: consumer-init-install 11/11 still pass, module-mode test surface intact (52 exports). Deferred follow-ups (carved-out, ready to be picked up next session): 44-32e (interactive feature picker reshape), 44-33c-exe (Bun --compile of launcher.cjs to launcher.exe), 44-34 (real portable-Node download once release pipeline publishes node-platform-arch.zip), pre-publish guard on dist/release/site-v<tag>.zip in release-binaries.yml, dedicated tests/installer-feature-flags.test.cjs. Planned queue: 21-23b cancelled earlier today; 35-10 (deep architectural review), 44-13 (delegated to claude lane), 44-28 (umbrella, awaiting follow-ups), 45-21 done. Open follow-up notes: `2026-04-18-findings-belong-in-docs-site.md`, `2026-04-18-stray-openai-codex-tree.md`, `2026-04-18-44-28-spine-first-cut.md`. Next: queue at natural pause unless user signals more spine work or wants 35-10 (architectural review) opened.
